metadata.releaseNotes: This update brings UI improvements, resolves multiple bugs including notification navigation issues, and includes library upgrades for better performance and overall app stability.
metadata.description:
Welcome to Liquide, your trusted partner in stock market and mutual fund investing!
As India’s premier SEBI-registered Research Analyst, we bring you a cutting-edge financial advisory experience like no other. With curated stock market tools, Liquide is your personal stock investment guide and advisor, right at your fingertips.

Key Features:
1. Stock Trade Recommendations
Whether you're looking for short-term opportunities or long-term strategies, our stock advisor provides recommendations to align with your investment objectives. Whether you're experienced or just starting, we ensure the best support for your journey.
2. F&O Recommendations 
Elevate your trading experience with Futures and Options (F&O), integrated seamlessly within the app. Gain access to advanced F&O strategies and stay ahead with timely insights to help you navigate the market.
3. Portfolio Health Analysis 
Our portfolio health analysis helps you assess your portfolio's overall strength, highlights areas of concer

reviews.author: Sha Viv
reviews.title: Not recommended
reviews.content:
this application is not providing expected output and the scripts which is committed to give advisory of the different trades daily basis. they are only sending the message regarding the promotion for you registration.

it’s not easy to use as well, as it is showing the repetitive options to invest

reviews.author: salamandersam123
reviews.title: Worst app No support
reviews.content: This app only keeps promoting and sells. But does not live up to expectations. All the recommendations it gives leads to losses. There is no proper support available when there is an issue with the app.

reviews.author: Liquid aap
reviews.title: The liquid aap
reviews.content: It seems to be a scam. They recommend stocks and remove/delete it immediately when it falls stating ‘ went out buying range’ I lost 90k by buying a stock they recommended (Advance Agro)I asked them whether to hold this stock as it is falling drastically. Hover they advised me to hold it and at last when my loss crossed 50k, they cancelled their recommendation silently. One of the poor aap in this category. All the reviews they shows are self generated to mislead people. Not even a 5 % accuracy on their recommendations. Please don’t fall in their trap,

reviews.author: Amit thakre
reviews.title: Worst paid service app
reviews.content:
given trade in the group is not correct and this app shows different success rate. 
most of the trade in telegram channel are not accurate instead of this join any free telegram channel. 
You are sebi registered then your trade should have that quality. The experience is not good

reviews.author: Harsh1619

Team is very pro-active when making a sale but after sales support is zero.
They even mis-sell. They pushed me to take a 15 month plan but I got a 12 month plan instead and no response after I emailed or reached out to their employees.

reviews.author: Prabhat121
reviews.title: Fraud app
reviews.content: I recently upgraded to the Pro version, but I strongly advise against it. I’ve noticed two major red flags: first, the app appears to delete losing recommendations to hide its poor track record. Second, it displays inflated profit figures compared to actual market results. These deceptive practices suggest the app is fraudulent. Save your money.

And they do not say its loss in trade but it shows cost to cost and those trades are all in losses.

reviews.author: jim manjooran
reviews.title: scam
reviews.content:
This app is very poorly made. 
I have subscribed for the premium version to be able to access all the so called benefits.
But Limo keeps stopping and I am  blocked from
using it.
Today is the third time that this has happened.
Despite paying good money, i am unable to avail
of the services.
Today, when logged in to
use Limo, I am blocked and directed for KYC despite completing it before..And the OTP for the KYC is never received.   
This appears to be a scam.
I tried to reach Support and I get the auto reply that “we are away”..this is the scam service after taking my money.
Complaint to SEBI and Consumer Court follows.

reviews.author: I-Mac-Amit
reviews.title: Less Know how
reviews.content:
Well to be honest initially when I was consulted I was impressed but after few session of recommending strategy I realized that the team is not experienced to advice clients if the strategy is suitable for NRI ETC.  they will ask you to open and account in some other bank because the app does not connect with certain brokers or banks etc and it is absolutely annoying no solution was given apart from doing it manually, 
I do understand the nuisances with SEBI and regulations etc however I definitely feel lack of experience in the team, one more glorified app which is good but no use to
NRI clients and the teams needs to work to have solutions

Also the black UI is very dull, please give an option to change it to white.

reviews.author: Sambhaji Naik
reviews.title: Not worth to take subscription
reviews.content:
I downloaded app after watching add on Instagram .
1. It dosent give proper analysis of your portfolio. For me it’s just said no red flags ..I was expecting more for them to say sale/ buy more.
2. It just keep behind you for getting subscription once you subscribe they won’t care what you are doing. 
3. Market analysis give multiple stocks to but you won’t able to achieve anything . And they will just show out of 100 prediction whichever archives target they will market it as achievement . It is obvious when you predict 100 definitely few will achieve target.
4. For futures and options additional subscription and they will send you 10 msg to subscribe and zero msg for stock updates.
5. Whole aim to add new customer long run this company is not going anywhere.
6. Analysis is not always correct . I did predicted one stock prise and it achieved target while Nimo was saying not to buy stick surged 20% in 15 days .
Company has to do more to retain customers ..

reviews.title: Great Apps

Good but always open eye in digital platforms like this one apps.
Liquide has many of the hallmarks of a promising and powerful investing tool. It blends analytics, AI support, portfolio diagnostics, alerts, and more into a cohesive package. For users who want guidance, insights, and curated ideas (without having to always build everything themselves), it offers a compelling value proposition.
